title: Implement src/runtime/memory.js — semantic memory API
description:
src/runtime/memory.js does not exist but PRD requires it. Compose store/index.js (KV) + runtime/embed.js (vector embedding) into a semantic memory module.

API:
- add(text, metadata?) → embed text via embed.js, store vector + metadata via store/index.js
- search(query, topK=5) → embed query, vector similarity search against stored embeddings, return top-K results

Dependencies: store/index.js and runtime/embed.js are both implemented and tested.

Acceptance criteria:
1. File exists at src/runtime/memory.js
2. Exports add(text, metadata?) and search(query, topK)
3. Uses agentic-store via store/index.js for persistence
4. Uses agentic-embed via runtime/embed.js for vector embedding
5. Tests pass
